issues.description: Action 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Card text says 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active', which requires SearchDeck to find a DON!! from deck, then AttachDon to set it active. GiveDon creates a new DON!!, not searches deck.

KO action missing conditional requirement. Text states 'if you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field', which requires a HasCardOnBoard condition on the field state, not just the trigger condition. Current DSL lacks this gate.
KO target scope should specify ChooseOpponentCharacter with maxCost:4, but should be conditional on field state (8+ DON!! on field). Current action executes unconditionally.
